title: linuxptp bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[4.4-3]
- fix unicast server to recover after port fault (RHEL-93496)

[4.4-2]
- add experimental option for external PPS in ts2phc automatic mode
  (RHEL-72468)
- add command to set external grandmaster properties (RHEL-90585)
- refresh link status on faults (RHEL-56168)
full_text:
[4.4-3]
- fix unicast server to recover after port fault (RHEL-93496)

[4.4-2]
- add experimental option for external PPS in ts2phc automatic mode
  (RHEL-72468)
- add command to set external grandmaster properties (RHEL-90585)
- refresh link status on faults (RHEL-56168)

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20793.html
